intro: Galium heuffelii, also known as Heuffel's bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic activities, providing relief from conditions such as pain, fever, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Galium heuffelii include flavonoids, iridoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Galium heuffelii is commonly prepared as an infusion or a tincture, often used to treat menstrual disorders, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions.
